topics: Introduction to Data: Structured, Unstructured, Semi-structured Data, Datasets & Patterns
Brief History of Data Science
Introduction to Data Science
Importance of Data Science
Differences between AI, ML, DL, Data Science & Data Analytics
Real World Applications of Data Science
Steps in Data Science Process
Ethical and Privacy Implications of Data Science
Tools and Skills Needed: Introduction to Platforms, Tools, Frameworks, Languages, Databases and Libraries, Current Trends & Major Research Challenges in Data Science
Matrices to Represent Relations between Data and Necessary Linear Algebraic Operations on Matrices
Approximately Representing Matrices by Decompositions (SVD and PCA)
Statistics, Descriptive Statistics, Distributions and Probability
Statistical Inference: Populations and Samples, Statistical Modeling, Probability Distributions, Fitting a Model, Hypothesis Testing
Data Pre-processing
Data Cleaning, Data Integration, Data Reduction, Data Transformation and Data Discretization
Evaluation of Classification Methods: Confusion Matrix, Student's T-Tests and ROC Curves
Exploratory Data Analysis: Basic Tools (Plots, Graphs and Summary Statistics)
Philosophy of EDA
Basic Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear Regression, Logistic Regression, Classifiers
Feature Generation and Feature Selection: Feature Selection Algorithms, Filters, Wrappers
Decision Trees and Random Forests

Project Suggestions: Implementing Data Related Projects Using Techniques from the Syllabus, Including Data Storage, Pre-processing, Data Mining and Pattern Recognition, with Socially Relevant Domains and Public Datasets (e.g., Kaggle)
